name: WebSwarm: Recursive Multi-Agent Orchestration for Deep-and-Wide Web Search

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: We propose WebSwarm, a progressive recursive delegation framework that jointly constructs task decomposition, recursive expansion, and agent collaboration during inference. WebSwarm dynamically instantiates agentic search nodes, each coupling a local objective with a search mode. Each node can either solve its objective or delegate child nodes; after solving, it returns evidence upward. Experiments on BrowseComp-Plus, WideSearch, and DeepWideSearch show consistent outperformance.
